except.reason: the growth routine's own doc names the wiki folders it maintains

rules.reason: product-wiki/Market, product-wiki/Users, product-wiki/Competitors, product-wiki/Domain, and product-wiki/sample-data are a self-growing market/user/competitor/domain research wiki kept decoupled from the extension's source, tests, and docs; product-wiki/product-requirements is the one folder still reachable from here

sharedConstants.what: extension version — one X.Y.Z token per file, kept identical across the manifest and package.json (bumped by the canon daily auto-release and the human "bump version" flow); regex so it needs no re-pinning on a bump
